text:
Two friends, Tom and Jerry, decided to embark on an epic scavenger hunt in the quirky town of Quirkyville. Tom had meticulously planned every step of the journey, his trusty map in hand, while Jerry, always the adventurous soul, couldn't wait to discover new and exciting things.

The hunt began at the entrance to what seemed like an ordinary shop—a peculiar little place known as "The Oddity Emporium." It was the perfect starting point.

Tom handed Jerry the map and confidently began, "First, we need to find the Whispering Wall—said to carry voices from those who've been lost to time."

Jerry grinned and followed Tom inside. The shop was a jumble of one-of-a-kind trinkets and artifacts. Tom pointed to the corner where the Whispering Wall stood.

As Jerry approached, he noticed a faint rustling sound from behind a dusty hanging pendent. He stepped forward, curious:

"Did you hear that, Jerry?"
